title: CloudConvert node connection issue
symptom: When trying to connect the CloudConvert node using API key or OAuth2, the user receives 'Couldn’t connect with these settings' or 'Something went wrong. Please try again.' messages.
not_this_if: Using a publicly accessible URL for webhook
root_cause: The CloudConvert node requires a publicly accessible URL for OAuth2 and API key connections. Using 'localhost' or a non-public URL leads to connection failures as the service cannot reach the local instance of n8n.
fix_steps: Set up a publicly accessible URL using ngrok or a similar service.
Update the WEBHOOK_URL in your environment settings with the new URL.
Copy and paste the new URL into the CloudConvert node settings.
agent_instruction: Use ngrok to create a public URL and update the CloudConvert node settings accordingly.
